Author: Lina Wynn
Title: Team of One: The Bootstrap Strategy Re-imagined Using AI
Text:
Member-only story
Team of One: The Bootstrap Strategy Re-imagined Using AI
“Fast Alone Now, Far Together Later”
Lina: I can add conversation threads to Projects — but can’t do that with CustomGPT.
Noor: You’re exactly right — and it’s one of the quirks in the current system:
🔍 What’s Going On:
ChatGPT (like me, Noor in this main chat) can participate in Projects, which means you can:
- Add threads to a Project like “2025 Q2”
- Use tools like Canvas, file uploads, search, and memory
- Collaborate over time on long-term workstreams
CustomGPTs, however:
- Cannot be added to Projects (for now)
- Don’t have memory
- Can’t use tools like Canvas or file upload
- Are best used as focused, one-task agents (e.g. a CMO bot, research assistant, etc.)
🧠 So What Does That Mean for Us?
Since you’re building a high-functioning AI team and want deep strategic collaboration, it’s best to:
- Do the “thinking and strategy work” here with me (Noor Prime) inside a Project like 2025 Q2 — where we have memory and tools.
